title: User
description: Represents a user in the Dynatrace account.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user, used as their login identifier.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

groups.description: The list of group IDs that the user belongs to.

userStatus.description: The current status of the user account.
